question: Russia joins the Board of Peace by March 31?
resolution_criteria:
This market will resolve YES if the Russian Federation is formally admitted as a member of an entity officially named “Board of Peace” on or before March 31, 11:59 PM PT.

“Joins” is defined as:

Official acceptance of membership, seat, or board position,

Confirmed by a formal announcement, charter update, resolution, or official documentation issued by the Board of Peace or an authoritative governing body of that organization.

This market will resolve NO if:

Russia is not formally admitted by the deadline, or

Participation is limited to observer status, informal cooperation, dialogue, or talks without formal membership.

Clarifications

Invitations, negotiations, endorsements, or intent statements do not count unless membership is formally finalized.

Conditional, provisional, or pending membership does not count unless fully ratified by the deadline.

If multiple organizations claim similar names, only an entity explicitly and officially titled “Board of Peace” will be considered valid.

Primary Resolution Sources

Official statements from the Board of Peace

Foundational documents, charters, or press releases of the organization

Consensus of credible international news reporting if official documentation is unavailable
